# polaris_feature_flag (Data Source)

The `polaris_feature_flag` data source is used to check if a feature flag is enabled for
the RSC account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Feature flag name.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the feature flag is enabled for the RSC account.
- `id` (String) SHA-256 hash of the feature flag name.
